summary: Indeed, the desire of Clan civilians for better

mechanics.name_guess: Indeed, the desire of Clan civilians for better
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 033 > npcs > Indeed, the desire of Clan civilians for better
mechanics.excerpt: Indeed, the desire of Clan civilians for better life was one of the driving forces behind the Crusader philosophy; pushing the warrior caste tor return to the per- ceived Eden of the Inner Sphere. As the Nova Cat and Ghost Bear civilian castes have discovered, however, the Inner Sphere is not the paradise they hoped tor. Game Materlal Because Clan society is starkly different from that of the Inner Sphere (see The Clans_ 189, for more information) , Clan characters follow some different rules for character cre ation, especially with regard to the Life Path.
